errors.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.quota_exceeded: Your monthly quota has been exceeded. Please upgrade your plan.
errors.validation_failed: Some fields are invalid. Please review and try again.

banner.title: We respect your privacy
banner.body: We use cookies to keep you signed in and to understand how the service is used. You can accept all, reject non-essential, or pick what you allow.

preferences.title: Cookie preferences
preferences.description: Adjust how the portal uses cookies. Changes apply immediately.

categories.necessaryDescription: Authentication, session, and security cookies. The service cannot function without them.
categories.analyticsDescription: Error reporting (Sentry) and aggregate usage metrics that help us improve the product.
categories.marketingDescription: Reserved for future campaigns. Currently no marketing cookies are set.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how TIKTON Portal ("we", "us") collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our video repurposing service.

dataCollected.title: What we collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect the minimum data needed to operate the service:

items.email: Account email address — used for sign-in, notifications, and account recovery.
items.payment: Payment information — handled by Stripe; we store tokens, not card numbers.
items.ip: IP address — used for security, fraud prevention, and abuse detection.
items.device: Device and browser metadata (user agent, language, viewport) — used for rendering and diagnostics.
items.cookies: Cookies — strictly necessary (session) plus opt-in analytics cookies.
items.uploads: Source TikTok URLs and pipeline outputs — retained only as long as needed to deliver the service.

purposes.title: How we use it
purposes.intro: We process personal data for the following purposes:

items.service: Service delivery — authenticating you, processing your submitted videos, delivering the rendered output.
items.billing: Billing — managing subscriptions, processing payments, and handling refunds.
items.security: Security — detecting abuse, protecting accounts, and investigating incidents.
items.improvement: Product improvement — understanding aggregate usage to fix bugs and prioritize features.
items.legal: Legal compliance — meeting tax, accounting, and law-enforcement obligations when required.

thirdParties.title: Third-party processors
thirdParties.intro: We share data only with the sub-processors below, and only the minimum each needs to perform its role:

items.stripe: Stripe — payment processing. Card data never touches our servers.
items.sentry: Sentry — error and performance monitoring (only if you grant analytics consent).
items.hosting: Cloud hosting provider — application logs and stored assets.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.intro: Depending on your jurisdiction (GDPR, CCPA, etc.) you have the right to:

items.access: Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
items.rectification: Rectification — correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
items.deletion: Deletion — request erasure of your account and associated data.
items.portability: Portability — receive your data in a machine-readable format.
items.object: Object — opt out of processing based on legitimate interest.

rights.contact: To exercise any right, contact us at

retention.title: Data retention
retention.body: We retain account data for the life of the account and delete it within 30 days of account closure, except where retention is required by law (e.g. tax records).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of TIKTON Portal. By creating an account you agree to them.

service.title: 1. The service
service.body: TIKTON Portal provides automated video repurposing: download a public TikTok video, generate subtitles, voice, color grade, and music, and deliver a rendered output. Outputs are generated by AI and may not be perfect; you are responsible for reviewing them before publication.

items.account: Keep your account credentials confidential. You are responsible for activity under your account.
items.lawful: Only submit videos that you have the legal right to repurpose, or that are in the public domain.
items.content: Do not submit content that is unlawful, infringing, defamatory, or that violates any third-party rights.
items.noAbuse: Do not attempt to disrupt the service, reverse-engineer it, or use it to train competing models.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
ip.body: We retain all rights in the service itself (software, brand, design). You retain rights to the source content you submit, and you own the rendered output we generate for you, subject to your compliance with these terms and the rights of the original content owner.

disclaimer.title: 4. Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The service is provided "as is" and "as available". To the extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for purpose, and non-infringement.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by law, our aggregate liability for any claim arising from or related to the service is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or USD 100, whichever is greater.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.body: We may suspend or terminate your account if you materially breach these terms. You may close your account at any time from the Account page; data deletion is governed by our Privacy Policy.

law.title: 7. Governing law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the jurisdiction in which our company is registered, without regard to conflict-of-laws principles. Disputes will be resolved in the competent courts of that jurisdiction.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: We want you to be happy with TIKTON Portal. If something is not right, here is how refunds work.

policy.title: 1. Eligibility
policy.body: Refunds are available under the following conditions:

items.sevenDays: Within 7 days of your first paid charge on a new subscription — full refund, no questions asked.
items.proRata: After 7 days — prorated refund for the unused portion of the current billing period, calculated to the day.
items.credits: Unused credits purchased but not consumed — refundable at the original purchase price.
items.exclusions: Add-ons and one-off processing fees are non-refundable once the underlying service has been delivered.

steps.email: Email support@tikton.example from the address on your account.
steps.review: Include the invoice number and a brief reason (helps us improve).
steps.reply: Our support team will reply within 5 business days.
steps.refund: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 10 business days.

timeline.title: 3. Timeline
timeline.body: Refunds requested within the 7-day window are typically processed within 2 business days. Later requests follow the review timeline above. We will notify you at each step by email.

dataDeletion.title: Delete my data
dataDeletion.intro: Request permanent deletion of your TIKTON Portal account and all associated personal data.
dataDeletion.warningBody: Once your account is deleted, it cannot be recovered. The following will be permanently removed:

consequences.tasks: All submitted tasks and rendered outputs.
consequences.subscription: Active subscription will be cancelled immediately; no further refunds are issued.

dataDeletion.mustMatchAccount: Must match the email address on your account.
dataDeletion.successBody: We have received your request and will process it within 30 days. You will be notified by email at each step.

landing.tagline: Repurpose TikTok videos into English & Spanish — automate subtitles, voice, color grade, music.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Translate to EN / ES with native TTS.

verifyEmail.title: Check your email
verifyEmail.body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please reload the page or contact support if the problem persists.
